authority_boundary.fixed_between_variants: project-owned eight-form coigue meshes, V12 runtime-far representation, V22 RGB-padded leaf atlas, alpha2 no-shadow material, source masks, terrain, water, rocks, cameras, lighting, physics, and saved map
authority_boundary.changed_in_dense_variant: camera-local centerline window, 9000-tree target, 6.5 m minimum spacing, 24 m river setback, 750 m maximum lateral coverage, reduced micro-gap thinning, and 0.78-1.12 scale range

accepted_findings: Both camera-local variants reach the full 9000-tree target while preserving source vegetation and water masks, slope and elevation rejection, deterministic placement, and collision-free transient ownership.
The denser profile changes 4.77 percent of guide-seat pixels and 6.50 percent of river-eye pixels, proving that insufficient route-wide density was one visible cause of the empty slopes.
The retained alpha2 no-shadow material keeps individual crown color readable without reintroducing V15 ground carpets or V23 crown self-darkening.
The exact placement counts and coverage window provide a reproducible upper-bound workload for later area-sampled mixed-ecology and performance tests.
rejection_reasons: Centerline-progress plus lateral-offset sampling resolves into conspicuous contour-following rows, hard forest edges, and exposed parallel trunk fences instead of irregular temperate-rainforest stands.

Increasing the tree target from 1200 to 9000 raises guide-seat dark coverage from 2.66 to 5.56 percent and river-eye dark coverage from 3.90 to 7.59 percent without a meaningful whole-image green-classification gain.
A single repeated coigue family cannot supply crown-age diversity, riparian shrubs, bamboo, ferns, epiphytes, snags, deadwood, or a credible treeline and aspect transition.
Smooth 30 m terrain, tan provisional ground response, flat tiled water, sparse boulders, clear blue atmosphere, and absent spray or valley cloud still dominate both frames.
No moving-camera, wind, masked-overdraw, streaming, packaged desktop, console, handheld, or on-device VR evidence exists for 9000 trees per local review window.
next_iteration_requirements: Replace centerline-parallel candidate generation with deterministic two-dimensional area sampling over the source vegetation mask, using blue-noise spacing, broad density noise, feathered mask boundaries, irregular stand gaps, and explicit river-distance and treeline gradients.

Add ecology-reviewed age and vertical strata before another density comparison: dominant coigue adults and intermediates, a second accepted native canopy family, riparian shrubs, bamboo or fern understory, epiphyte cues, snags, and deadwood.
Retain alpha2 with leaf shadows disabled until a simplified sparse shadow proxy passes both the V15 off-crown artifact metric and V23 crown-photometry metric.

Pair the next ecology pass with world-aligned terrain detail, source-consistent forest-floor color, improved turquoise water response, boulder and gravel-bar structure, humid mountain atmosphere, and spray so canopy is reviewed in a representative scene.
Profile moving-camera temporal stability, wind, HISM culling, masked overdraw, memory, streaming, and packaged desktop, console, handheld, and VR cost before production promotion.
